meta.title: Stitchra | AI Embroidery Platform
meta.description: Design, preview and request custom embroidered T-shirts with transparent pricing.

hero.subtitle: Turn a logo idea into a premium embroidered T-shirt. See the fabric, placement and price before the first stitch is made.
hero.mainImageAlt: Cinematic close-up of embroidery texture and fabric
hero.photoCaptionText: Premium artwork prepared for a stitched finish.
hero.threadText: Curated tones for a premium stitched finish.
hero.workflowText: Create the idea, check the chest placement and quote with confidence.

designer.promptPlaceholder: giraffe riding a car through space
designer.paletteHelp: Embroidery designs work best with a clear color palette. Up to 15 thread colors can be used depending on the artwork.
designer.manualQuoteText: This design is large or very detailed. We will review it before production.
designer.readyText: Your design is ready for embroidery.

status.logoReady: Logo cleaned and ready for embroidery.
status.manualColorReview: Logo cleaned — manual color review may be needed.
status.getQuoteBeforeOrder: Get a quote before requesting an order.
status.requestSent: Request sent. We will review your design.
status.orderSendFailed: Could not send this order request.

validation.phoneInvalid: Use +, spaces, digits, brackets or dashes, with at least 7 digits.

sections.processText: A calm flow for creators, students, clubs and small brands. Start with an idea, preview the shirt and get a clear quote before checkout.
sections.featuresText: AI design, logo cleanup, shirt preview and pricing in one premium embroidery workspace.
sections.craftTitle: A premium stitched finish, shown in close detail
sections.craftText: Stitchra keeps the customer focused on the final result: embroidery detail, fabric texture, thread detail and a clear price before stitching. The visual system is built for confident artwork preview and ready for production decisions.
sections.galleryText: Clean directions for chest logos, team drops, patches and minimal creator merch.
sections.pricingText: No surprise messages. The estimate is based on artwork detail, colors and coverage.
sections.faqText: Clear for international creators and small teams before they place an order.
sections.ctaTitle: Ready to create your first stitched piece?
sections.ctaText: Upload a logo or write an idea. See it on fabric and get a clear price before you order.

process.title: Choose the garment
process.text: Start with a dark or light tee and choose the placement that fits the brand.

process.title: Shape the artwork
process.text: Write a simple idea or upload a customer logo and prepare it for embroidery.

process.title: See it on fabric
process.text: Check the logo on the chest with fabric texture, shadow and real placement size.

process.title: Quote with confidence
process.text: Show artwork detail, colors and cost before the first sample is made.

features.title: AI logo direction
features.text: Type a short idea and create a clean first concept for embroidery.

features.title: Fabric-aware preview
features.text: Blend the logo into the shirt with texture, shadow and natural contrast.

features.title: Logo cleanup
features.text: Remove simple backgrounds and crop extra space for a cleaner preview.

features.title: Clear price before stitching
features.text: Preview cost from artwork detail, color count and logo coverage.

gallery.title: Quiet monograms
gallery.text: Clean initials for small chest branding, student clubs and makers.

gallery.title: Streetwear marks
gallery.text: Bold symbols for creator drops, local labels and launch pieces.

gallery.title: Patch badges
gallery.text: Badge-style artwork that stays readable when stitched.

gallery.title: Minimal graphics
gallery.text: Low-detail artwork with a premium, quiet fashion look.

craft.artworkText: Ready for production with a clear price before stitching.
craft.workflowText: Upload, preview and quote in one calm flow.

pricing.exampleText: Small chest logo, clean detail, 3 colors
pricing.uploadForQuote: Upload your design for a clear quote

faq.question: Can I upload my own logo?
faq.answer: Yes. Upload a logo, remove simple backgrounds, preview it on the shirt and get a clear price.

faq.question: Can AI create a logo idea?
faq.answer: Yes. Write a simple prompt like “minimal green logo for a coffee brand” and generate a first concept.

faq.question: Is the price final?
faq.answer: It is a clear estimate based on artwork detail, colors and coverage. Final details can be confirmed before payment.

faq.question: Who is this for?
faq.answer: Small brands, students, creators, teams and shops that need fast custom T-shirt quotes.
